stat.title: No-Hitter Bid Ruiners
stat.subtitle: Games where the first hit came after 6 hitless innings.

notableEvents.label: Leody Taveras breaks up no-hitter · Top 9
notableEvents.detail: Leody Taveras singles on a ground ball to right fielder George Valera.
